entity.summary: BNB Chain ve(3,3) decentralized exchange providing token swaps, v2 and concentrated-liquidity pools, gauges, bribe markets, custom and dynamic fee tiers, and public protocol analytics.
entity.notes: Current first-party website identifies Topaz as a live BNB Chain ve(3,3) DEX and links the production application, live statistics, verified contracts, audit, open-source code, and complete documentation. No exact initial launch date, legal entity, or jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: Topaz DEX official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website states that Topaz is live on BNB Chain and exposes the production application, protocol statistics, audited contracts, gauges, bribes, swaps, and liquidity functions.

evidence.title: Topaz DEX documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation covers swaps and routing, v2 pools, concentrated-liquidity positions, fee tiers, gauges, incentives, contracts, and public data APIs.
